gold.title: Tetris Loader
gold.reason: Tetris-block animated loader — highly memorable and playful, perfect for tech product loading screens and demos.

gold.title: Orbital Loader
gold.reason: Orbiting element loader — visually impressive and polished, great for full-page loading on marketing sites.

gold.title: Luma Spin
gold.reason: Luma-style gradient spin loader — sleek and modern, echoes premium SaaS brand aesthetics.

gold.title: Animated Loading Skeleton
gold.reason: Animated skeleton loader — essential polished pattern that signals content quality while data loads.

gold.title: Preloader
gold.reason: Full-screen preloader — high-impact first impression component for premium marketing sites.

gold.title: Quantum Pulse Loader
gold.reason: Quantum pulse animation — distinctive and visually striking, fits futuristic tech/AI brand aesthetics.

silver.title: Animated Loader
silver.reason: Cool animated loader — visually engaging alternative to standard spinners.

silver.title: Morphing Square
silver.reason: Morphing square animation — clean geometric loader with smooth transitions.

silver.title: Wave Loader
silver.reason: Wave animation loader — fluid and organic motion suitable for creative and media sites.

silver.title: Bouncing Dots
silver.reason: Bouncing dots loader — familiar and friendly pattern for chat and content loading states.

silver.title: Snow Ball Loading Spinner
silver.reason: Snowball spin effect — unique and charming for seasonal or creative brand sites.

silver.title: Customizable Loader Spinner Transition
silver.reason: Customizable spinner with transitions — flexible baseline adaptable to any brand.

silver.title: iOS Spinner
silver.reason: iOS-style spinner — familiar and trusted pattern that works across mobile-first marketing sites.

silver.title: Loading Spinner
silver.reason: Clean spinner set with variants — well-designed utility for various loading contexts.
